title: Bomb Squad
description: A utility mod that notifies you of other players on the same server using exploits/crash items.
body:
# Bomb Squad Mod

## Info
- Latest version: 1.0.0

## Features
- Alerts when a player is holding an item with a malformed **item model**

This was made primarily for hypixel housing.
There will be more features in the future this is just the first release of the mod.
